sections.text:

JSONB query on the metadata column isn't hitting the GIN index. Query planner picks seq scan. The users_org_idx partial index is not being used by the planner on the member-list query.

The daily snapshot job failed because the backup role lost the SELECT grant on the new partitions. Read replica lag hit 12s during the bulk import; we need to batch the writes smaller. pgBouncer transaction pooling breaks our use of SET LOCAL statement_timeout.

Evaluation harness: 500 labeled queries, we A/B test embedding models nightly against this set. Prompt engineering for the summarization agent: we're getting too many bullet points, want paragraphs.

Fine-tuning Qwen3-Embedding-4B on our internal ticket corpus improved retrieval P@10 by 3.2 points.

documents.semantic_id: PRD: Embedding Drift: After The Model Update, Existing Chunks No Longer Match New Queries Well

sections.text:
## Problem
The reranker is returning identical scores for candidates with very different content — the model is clipping. Idempotency cache is evicting entries too fast — we're seeing double-ingests on Nango webhook retries.

## Goals & non-goals
Permission sync for Confluence is 4 hours behind because the cursor-based pagination hit a rate limit. Embedding drift: after the model update, existing chunks no longer match new queries well.

## User stories
The hybrid_alpha=0.7 default is too vector-heavy for technical content; 0.5 works better in eval. Chunk overlap at 20% isn't enough for long-form legal docs; bump to 30% for that tenant. Permission sync for Confluence is 4 hours behind because the cursor-based pagination hit a rate limit.

## Success metrics
The hybrid_alpha=0.7 default is too vector-heavy for technical content; 0.5 works better in eval.
